examiner_note: Đây là một câu hỏi mang tính giải thích lý do (Reasons). Bạn nên đưa ra 2-3 lợi ích cốt lõi của ngân hàng như: tính bảo mật (security), tích lũy tài sản (accumulating wealth), và các dịch vụ đi kèm (loans, mortgage). Sử dụng các cụm từ như 'financial safe haven', 'manage their finances', 'long-term investment' để nâng cao chất lượng câu trả lời.

band7.text: I think the main reason people use banks is for security. It's much safer than keeping a large amount of cash at home. Also, banks allow us to save money for the future and provide us with loans when we want to buy something big like a car or a house.
band7.note: Trả lời trực tiếp, bao quát được các ý chính (security, saving, loans). Sử dụng từ vựng ở mức khá.

band8.text: People utilize banks primarily for their unparalleled security and financial management tools. Banks serve as a reliable institution where individuals can safeguard their hard-earned money. Furthermore, they offer essential financial products like mortgages and high-interest savings accounts, which are crucial for long-term wealth accumulation.
band8.note: Sử dụng từ vựng chuyên nghiệp (utilize, unparalleled, safeguard, mortgages, wealth accumulation). Cách dẫn đạt mạch lạc và thuyết phục.

band9.text: Banks essentially function as the backbone of modern financial stability for most people. Beyond the obvious security advantages of a regulated safe haven for one's capital, they provide the necessary infrastructure for seamless domestic and international transactions. Additionally, the availability of credit and complex investment instruments allows individuals to amplify their financial potential and achieve significant milestones like home ownership or entrepreneurial ventures. In short, they are indispensable for both individual prosperity and global economic fluidity.
band9.note: Từ vựng cực kỳ học thuật và chính xác (backbone, safe haven, capital, infrastructure, seamless, investment instruments, amplify, entrepreneurial ventures, prosperity, fluidity). Cách lập luận ở tầm vĩ mô và rất sâu sắc.

v.example: Building an emergency fund is key to your financial stability.
Agriculture is the backbone of the country’s economy.
Gold is often considered a safe haven for investors during a crisis.
We need more capital to expand our business abroad.
Investment in transport infrastructure helps boost economic growth.
Stocks, bonds, and mutual funds are common investment instruments.
This strategy will amplify our chances of success.

v.meaning: các dự án khởi nghiệp/kinh doanh
v.example: The bank provides funding for promising entrepreneurial ventures.
The country is enjoying a period of peace and prosperity.
Digital payments contribute to greater global economic fluidity.
Buying property is generally a good long-term investment.
Rules are in place to safeguard the rights of the children.

v.meaning: tích lũy tài sản/sự giàu có
v.example: Patience is essential when it comes to accumulating wealth over time.

v.meaning: khoản vay thế chấp mua nhà
v.example: They took out a thirty-year mortgage to buy the villa.
The central bank is seen as a reliable institution by the public.

v.meaning: tài khoản có hưởng lãi suất
v.example: I keep most of my money in an interest-bearing account.
The euro is the official currency of many European countries.
The wealthy family holds a vast amount of financial assets.
The bank is currently reviewing your loan application.
He used his house as collateral for the business loan.
The business has an overdraft facility to help with cash flow.
You can transfer money internationally using our banking app.
Always check your transaction history for any unauthorized changes.

v.meaning: khả năng trả nợ/tín nhiệm tín dụng
v.example: The bank checks your creditworthiness before approving a card.
I made a large deposit into my savings account today.
I need to withdraw some cash from the ATM.
The company was forced into bankruptcy due to its massive debts.
It's worth paying for professional financial advice when investing.
A mutual fund allows small investors to diversify their portfolio.

v.meaning: nhân viên môi giới chứng khoán
v.example: The stockbroker advised her to sell the shares now.
The bond market is often seen as safer than the stock market.
Cash is the most liquid asset, providing immediate liquidity.
The bank performs a thorough risk assessment on every loan.
Higher oil prices are increasing inflationary pressure globally.
The central bank uses monetary policy to control inflation.
The bank is preparing for the next downturn in the economic cycle.
Our website uses encryption to ensure every secure transaction.
Only authorized personnel have access to these files.
The company’s accounts are subject to an annual independent audit.
I use a spreadsheet to keep track of all my expenses.
It took him five years to pay off his student debt.
Saving for a down payment is a major financial hurdle for many.

v.meaning: khoản tiền tiết kiệm cho tương lai
v.example: They've built a nice nest egg for their children's education.

v.meaning: kiếm đồng nào xào đồng nấy/sống tằn tiện
v.example: Many families are struggling and living from hand to mouth.
He has to work two jobs just to make ends meet.
After winning the lottery, they were rolling in money.

v.meaning: thời gian là vàng bạc/tiền bạc
v.example: Let's get started immediately; remember that time is money.

v.word: put your money where your mouth is
v.meaning: hãy hành động thay vì chỉ nói suông
v.ipa: /pʊt jɔːr ˈmʌni wer jɔːr maʊθ ɪz/
v.example: You say you care about the environment, so put your money where your mouth is and donate.
The expensive camera was worth every penny for its quality.
A reliable internet connection is indispensable for remote work.
